html:
Exclusive to:

“Freeze the stage of a plant. This will make it unproductive, but also not attractive to parasites.”

-

The Embalming Spritz is an Equippable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can be used on plants in order to Scare or Wax them into a decorative state in which they do not produce any resources, but will never wilt, rot, change states, or be infested by Deadly Brightshades. Scared plants that can usually be dug up will still be able to be dug, however they will not stack and will continue to remain in the state that they were Scared in upon replanting.

It should be noted that one can Scare plants into what would otherwise be temporary states, forever, such as a Sapling permanently wilted from the summer heat, a Farm Plant permanently stuck in one of its growth phases, or a Tree stuck in the initial sapling phase.

Plants

If players try to cut down a scared tree, it will simply disappear.

Structures

All Plants that can be scared:

  • Berry Bush
  • Berry Bush
  • Juicy Berry Bush
  • Grass
  • Sapling
  • Lunar Sapling
  • Spiky Bush
  • Banana Bush
  • Stone Fruit Bush
  • Marble Shrub
  • Monkeytails
  • Evergreen
  • Lumpy Evergreen
  • Twiggy Tree
  • Birchnut Tree
  • Spiky Tree
  • Lune Tree
  • Palmcone Tree
  • Knobbly Tree
  • Gloomthorn
  • Sproutrock
  • Boulderbough
  • Carrot Plant
  • Toma Root Plant
  • Eggplant Stalk
  • Potato Plant
  • Dragon Fruit Vine
  • Pepper Plant
  • Pumpkin Plant
  • Onion Plant
  • Pomegranate Branch
  • Asparagus Fern
  • Corn Stalk
  • Durian Vine
  • Garlic Plant
  • Watermelon Plant
  • Forget-Me-Lots
  • Fire Nettles
  • Tillweed
  • Spiny Bindweed

Items

All Items that can be scared:

  • Berry Bush
  • Berry Bush
  • Juicy Berry Bush
  • Grass
  • Sapling
  • Lunar Sapling
  • Spiky Bush
  • Banana Bush
  • Monkeytails
  • Stone Fruit Bush
  • Gloomthorn Sapling
  • Sproutrock Sapling

Trivia

  • The Embalming Spritz was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.

Gallery

  • Player Sketches with Embalming Spritz found in game files

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Embalming Spritz
"A petrifying preserver of plant life."
Object Info
Equipable
75 uses (Scare)
Does not stack.
Crafting
×3 ×5 ×2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"beeswax_spray"
“Is that formaldehyde I smell?”
–Wilson
“The scariest part is how bad it smells.”
–Willow
“Is scary perfume for plants.”
–Wolfgang
“The bottled scent of fear.”
–Wendy
“WHAT IS THAT EVIL SMELL? I LIKE IT”
–WX-78
“It has an unpleasantly astringent odor.”
–Wickerbottom
“Lucy says she likes my own woody musk.”
–Woodie
“I'm picking up notes of terror, with a hint of dread.”
–Maxwell
“It hölds a fearsöme enchantment.”
–Wigfrid
“We're only allowed to spray it on plants.”
–Webber
“Peur-fume!”
–Warly
“Scary...”
–Wormwood
“I never liked perfume. Now I like it even less.”
–Winona
“A frightful fragrance for freezing flora!”
–Wortox
“Glurgh... stink spray!”
–Wurt
“It looks kind of like my mom's perfume, but it sure doesn't smell like it.”
–Walter
“If only I could make use of its unique preservation effects...”
–Wanda
“Freeze the stage of a plant. This will make it unproductive, but also not attractive to parasites.”
-
The Embalming Spritz is an Equippable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can be used on plants in order to Scare or Wax them into a decorative state in which they do not produce any resources, but will never wilt, rot, change states, or be infested by Deadly Brightshades. Scared plants that can usually be dug up will still be able to be dug, however they will not stack and will continue to remain in the state that they were Scared in upon replanting.
It should be noted that one can Scare plants into what would otherwise be temporary states, forever, such as a Sapling permanently wilted from the summer heat, a Farm Plant permanently stuck in one of its growth phases, or a Tree stuck in the initial sapling phase.
Plants[edit | edit source]
“It's frozen in fear!”
–Wilson, examining a scared Plant
“So it's just gonna stay that way forever?”
–Willow, examining a scared Plant
“Poor plant is too scared to grow.”
–Wolfgang, examining a scared Plant
“Stuck, unchanging, forever and ever...”
–Wendy, examining a scared Plant
“IT LIVES, BUT ALL METABOLIC PROCESSES HAVE CEASED. A COMPROMISE”
–WX-78, examining a scared Plant
“Perfectly preserved.”
–Wickerbottom, examining a scared Plant
“It won't wither away, but it also won't be growing anytime soon.”
–Woodie, examining a scared Plant
“It's frozen with fear.”
–Maxwell, examining a scared Plant
“Unnaturally preserved... it döth make öne's skin crawl.”
–Wigfrid, examining a scared Plant
“It'll stay like that forever!”
–Webber, examining a scared Plant
“Tsk, filled with preservatives!”
–Warly, examining a scared Plant
“Screaming! Friends are screaming!”
–Wormwood, examining a scared Plant
“It'll stay fresh as a daisy forever.”
–Winona, examining a scared Plant
“It's kept fresh with fear.”
–Wortox, examining a scared Plant
“Plant gonna be stuck like that forever?”
–Wurt, examining a scared Plant
“It's still alive... I think.”
–Walter, examining a scared Plant
“Perfectly preserved for all time.”
–Wanda, examining a scared Plant
If players try to cut down a scared tree, it will simply disappear.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Embalming Spritz là một Vật phẩm có thể trang bị độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong From Beyond. Nó có thể được sử dụng trên thực vật để dọa hoặc đánh sáp chúng vào trạng thái trang trí mà chúng không tạo ra bất kỳ tài nguyên nào, nhưng sẽ không bao giờ héo, thối rữa, thay đổi trạng thái hoặc bị lây nhiễm bởi Deadly Brightshades. Những cây sợ hãi thường có thể đào lên vẫn có thể đào được, tuy nhiên chúng sẽ không xếp chồng lên nhau và sẽ tiếp tục duy trì trạng thái sợ hãi khi trồng lại.
title: Embalming Spritz

The '''Embalming Spritz''' is an [[:Category:Equipable Items|Equippable Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It can be used on plants in order to Scare or Wax them into a decorative state in which they do not produce any resources, but will never wilt, rot, change states, or be infested by [[Deadly Brightshade]]s. Scared plants that can usually be dug up will still be able to be dug, however they will not stack and will continue to remain in the state that they were Scared in upon replanting. 

It should be noted that one can Scare plants into what would otherwise be temporary states, forever, such as a [[Sapling/DST|Sapling]] permanently wilted from the summer heat, a [[Farm Plant]] permanently stuck in one of its growth phases, or a [[Evergreen/DST|Tree]] stuck in the initial sapling phase.
